company.name: ADNOC
company.legalName: Abu Dhabi National Oil Company P.J.S.C.

coverage.availabilityNote: ADNOC P.J.S.C. does not publish a stable ten-year consolidated group financial statement set in the reviewed public sources. The dashboard therefore uses ADNOC Murban RSC LTD, ADNOC's primary debt capital markets entity within the ADNOC Group, as the official public disclosure proxy. 2016-2022 values are left blank; 2026 is excluded because only interim data was available as of 2026-07-09.

definitions.definition: Revenue recognized from Murban crude oil lifted by ADNOC Trading under the Offtake Agreement; ADNOC-lifted crude is not recognized as revenue under the agency accounting treatment.
Profit or loss for the period/year, including fair-value movements of the financial asset at FVTPL.
Net cash from operating activities as reported by ADNOC Murban RSC LTD.
Proxy defined as net cash from operating activities plus net cash from investing activities. Capex is not disclosed/applicable for the Murban proxy; do not treat this as ADNOC Group industrial FCF.
No capex line was disclosed for the Murban proxy; ADNOC Murban states it does not bear capital expenses for production and delivery of Murban crude.
Cash and cash equivalents at period/year end.
Net increase/decrease in cash and cash equivalents.
